title_en: Five minutes of stillness that change the whole day
title_el: Five minutes of stillness that change the whole day
excerpt_en: The small daily habits that carry the calm of a treatment long after you leave.
excerpt_el: The small daily habits that carry the calm of a treatment long after you leave.
body_en:
The calm of a treatment does not have to end at the door. A few minutes of stillness each day carry it much further than you would think.

Sit somewhere quiet, breathe slowly for five minutes, and let your shoulders drop. It is a small ritual, and it changes the whole shape of a day.
body_el:

title_en: Why warmth is the heart of every good massage
title_el: Why warmth is the heart of every good massage
excerpt_en: Hot stones, warm oil and warm linen. A look at the role temperature plays in deep rest.
excerpt_el: Hot stones, warm oil and warm linen. A look at the role temperature plays in deep rest.
body_en:
Warmth is doing more in a massage than most people realise. Warm oil, warm stones and warm linen all tell the body it is safe to let go.

Muscle releases far more easily once it is warm. It is why our rooms stay gentle and quiet, and why every treatment begins slowly.
body_el:
Warmth is doing more in a massage than most people realise. Warm oil, warm stones and warm linen all tell the body it is safe to let go.

Muscle releases far more easily once it is warm. It is why our rooms stay gentle and quiet, and why every treatment begins slowly.

title_en: Why we only book one guest at a time
title_el: Why we only book one guest at a time
excerpt_en: A calmer spa is a cleaner, more careful spa. A look at how we run our day.
excerpt_el: A calmer spa is a cleaner, more careful spa. A look at how we run our day.
body_en:
We only ever book one guest at a time. The spa stays quiet, the rooms stay spotless, and nobody feels hurried.

An hour of real rest cannot be rushed. The treatment needs its time, and so do you.
body_el:
